scripts.build: cd brave-and-planned-crm-development && npx prisma generate && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config vite.config.ts
scripts.start: cd brave-and-planned-crm-development && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && node server/index.js
scripts.db:push: cd brave-and-planned-crm-development && npx prisma db push
